caption: The video features three individuals seated on wooden chairs on a stage, engaged in a discussion or panel talk. The setting is well-lit with purple and white spotlights creating a vibrant atmosphere. The person on the left, dressed in a white shirt and dark pants, appears to be listening attentively. In the center, a woman wearing a black t-shirt and jeans sits with her hands clasped, also appearing attentive. On the right, a man in a gray suit gestures with his hands as he speaks, indicating that he is likely the one leading the conversation at this moment. The stage setup includes a table with a unique design resembling a circuit board, adding a tech-savvy element to the scene. The audience is partially visible in the foreground, suggesting an interactive session.
